testcase.name: calculatorChineseOperators

testcase.name: fetchPageValidUrl
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-30T18:16:32.605+08:00 INFO 31152 --- [ main] com.example.mva.tool.FetchPageTool : [FetchPage] 抓取: https://example.com
